# Team

Alpa Patel <alpanatha81@gmail.com>
Baskar Manivannan <mbaskar2000@gmail.com>

# Others

Howard Padwa <hpadwa@gmail.com>
https://www.uclaisap.org/profiles/padwa.html

Annie Peters, PhD, LP
https://www.naatp.org/staff

Harry Nelson
hnelson@leechtishman.com <hnelson@leechtishman.com>

# Competitors

https://erphealth.com/
https://www.chess.health/
https://www.behaivior.com/
https://www.pursuecare.com/
